title: Minecraft 1.30 Update
description: The modpack updates Minecraft and makes it what it should be in the eyes of players.
body:
##    Why wait for meager updates from Mojang? You can play the best Minecraft right now!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/cTcPDLFz5L0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

🚀 **Maximized performance for a seamless experience**

🎮 **Multiplayer support for endless fun with friends**

🏰 **Tons of exciting and challenging new dungeons**

🌍 **Fresh biomes across the Overworld, Nether, and End**

🏗️ **Enhanced vanilla structures for a revamped world**

🖥️ **Sleek and upgraded interface for better usability**

🌌 **Dive into the mysterious Warden Dimension**

🪑 **Stylish furniture to decorate your spaces**

🍳 **A new cooking system to satisfy your culinary creativity**

🌾 **Advanced farming mechanics for a richer agricultural experience**

##     Required Mods
 **Cupboard** [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard/files/5470034](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard/files/5470034)

 **BetterFpsDistance** [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-fps-render-distance-fabric/files/5136724](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-fps-render-distance-fabric/files/5136724)
